license: Bundled clips are license-verified free stock footage: office-corridor clips from Pexels (Pexels License - free for commercial use, no attribution) and elevator/lobby clips from Mixkit under the Mixkit Stock Video Free License (commercial use allowed). Face photos are frames extracted from those same clips. All people shown are stock-footage actors used purely as demo/test data.

persons.notes: Dummy test data - auto-created from Settings > Demo. Matches the 'Staff walk-in - Sokha' test video.
Dummy test data - auto-created from Settings > Demo. Matches the 'Staff walk-out - Bopha' test video.
Dummy test data - auto-created from Settings > Demo. Matches the 'Customer at the elevator - Visal' test video.
Dummy test data - auto-created from Settings > Demo. Matches the 'VIP customer from the elevator - Sreyneang' test video.

videos.label: Staff walk-in - Sokha (office corridor)
videos.description: Registered dummy staff. A man walks along the office corridor straight toward the camera - like an entry-door channel. Also marked as an attendance Entry door.

videos.label: Staff walk-out - Bopha (office corridor)
videos.description: Registered dummy staff. A staff woman carrying paperwork walks down the glass-walled office corridor toward the camera - used as the attendance Exit door.

videos.label: Customer at the elevator - Visal
videos.description: Registered dummy customer. A man walks through the office to the elevator, face close to the camera - like a channel watching the elevator door.

videos.label: VIP customer from the elevator - Sreyneang
videos.description: Registered dummy VIP customer. A woman steps out of the elevator and walks through the lobby toward the camera, another visitor in the background.

videos.label: Unknown visitor - office hallway (male)
videos.description: NOT registered. A man walks the same office hallway toward the camera. Tests the unknown-visitor flow: gender voting and the Hello sir greeting.
